title: Slow Filesystem Pressure
objective: A user state that creates many small plugin metadata files, used to expose synchronous metadata scans on slow filesystems such as WSL2.

setup.title: Write Many Plugin Manifests
setup.intent: Create a dense plugin metadata tree to make synchronous scans visible.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const root=path.join(home,"plugins","kova-slow-fs"); for (let i=0; i<250; i++) { const dir=path.join(root,`plugin-${i}`); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,"manifest.json"),JSON.stringify({id:`kova-slow-fs-${i}`,name:`Kova Slow FS ${i}`,version:"0.0.0",runtimeDependencies:["zod"]},null,2)); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,"package.json"),JSON.stringify({name:`kova-slow-fs-${i}`,version:"0.0.0"},null,2)); }'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files
